final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a full-width landing page layout with: top navigation bar, a 3-column hero section (left text column / center model / right product column), and a bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include all of the following elements:
  Header: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY", 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"], CTA button labeled "今すぐ試す"
  Hero left column:
    - Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
    - Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
    - 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"]
    - 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks: ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"]
    - 2 CTA buttons: ["初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"]
    - Trust badge line: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Hero center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Hero right column:
    - 2 product items: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box
    - 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]
  Bottom section: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, airy backdrop with purple floral accent elements — exact placement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use soft pink and white as primary palette, with purple flower accents and gold card accents
Materials/textures: needs soft, smooth UI surface treatment with rounded rectangles and floating card shadows — exact depth and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" / "今すぐ試す" / "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" / "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" / "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" / "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" / "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" / "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" / "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" / "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" / "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all 3 hero columns visible simultaneously; all text labels must be legible; stat cards must float over the product/model area; navigation links must appear in the header bar
Avoid: dark backgrounds, cluttered layouts, masculine or clinical aesthetics

{"prompt": "Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a full-width landing page layout with: top navigation bar, a 3-column hero section (left text column / center model / right product column), and a bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include all of the following elements:
  Header: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY", 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"], CTA button labeled "今すぐ試す"
  Hero left column:
    - Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
    - Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
    - 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"]
    - 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks: ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"]
    - 2 CTA buttons: ["初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"]
    - Trust badge line: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Hero center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Hero right column:
    - 2 product items: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box
    - 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]
  Bottom section: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, airy backdrop with purple floral accent elements — exact placement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use soft pink and white as primary palette, with purple flower accents and gold card accents
Materials/textures: needs soft, smooth UI surface treatment with rounded rectangles and floating card shadows — exact depth and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" / "今すぐ試す" / "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" / "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" / "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" / "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" / "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" / "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" / "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" / "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" / "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all 3 hero columns visible simultaneously; all text labels must be legible; stat cards must float over the product/model area; navigation links must appear in the header bar
Avoid: dark backgrounds, cluttered layouts, masculine or clinical aesthetics", "size": "1792x1008", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
